text.title: Modular Monolith Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the modular-monolith methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: name-bounded-contexts
step.action: List 3-8 bounded contexts; reject technical-layer names.
step.decision-gate: Any technical-layer name → STOP and rename.

step.name: design-public-apis
step.action: For each context, define the public API surface (operations + DTOs).

step.name: split-database-schemas
step.action: Allocate one Postgres schema per module; revoke cross-schema SELECT for app role.

step.name: install-import-linter
step.action: Add import-linter independence + layers contracts; wire into CI.
step.decision-gate: CI not green on initial run → fix violations before next step.

step.name: wire-domain-events
step.action: Implement in-process event bus or queue; forbid cross-module writes via shared tables.

step.name: document-extraction-readiness
step.action: Record per-module extraction readiness (schema isolation, public API, events). Used when a module needs to leave for microservices.
